PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); if [ "$TOOL" = "editFiles" ] || [ "$TOOL" = "create_file" ] || [ "$TOOL" = "replace_string_in_file" ]; then EDIT_COUNT_FILE="/tmp/copilot_edit_count"; COUNT=0; if [ -f "$EDIT_COUNT_FILE" ]; then COUNT=$(cat "$EDIT_COUNT_FILE"); fi; COUNT=$((COUNT + 1)); echo "$COUNT" > "$EDIT_COUNT_FILE"; if [ "$COUNT" -ge 5 ]; then echo "Reminder: $COUNT files edited this session. Consider running tests before committing."; echo "0" > "$EDIT_COUNT_FILE"; fi; fi; exit 0'
PostToolUse.windows: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); if [ "$TOOL" = "editFiles" ] || [ "$TOOL" = "create_file" ] || [ "$TOOL" = "replace_string_in_file" ]; then EDIT_COUNT_FILE="/tmp/copilot_edit_count"; COUNT=0; if [ -f "$EDIT_COUNT_FILE" ]; then COUNT=$(cat "$EDIT_COUNT_FILE"); fi; COUNT=$((COUNT + 1)); echo "$COUNT" > "$EDIT_COUNT_FILE"; if [ "$COUNT" -ge 5 ]; then echo "Reminder: $COUNT files edited this session. Consider running tests before committing."; echo "0" > "$EDIT_COUNT_FILE"; fi; fi; exit 0'
